-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%'
ORDER BY kommunenummer;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, representasjonspunkt, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [flomsoner]
SELECT omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3

-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join

-- right_source: 4

-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: aggregate

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- order_by: "teigid"
-- order_direction: "asc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- source_step: 8
-- limit: 10

ORDER BY kommunenummer;

3.sql: SELECT omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833));

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels in the municipality (filter by kommunenummer from step1)

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons reduced to municipality extent

4.description: get 200-year flood polygons reduced to municipality extent

6.description: find parcels intersecting flood polygons (from parcels already intersecting storm-surge)

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel teigid

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%'
ORDER BY kommunenummer;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, representasjonspunkt, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));
